_comment: i18n strict-mode allowlist. Keys here are exempt from --strict failures. Use only for: (a) dynamic keys built at runtime t('foo.' + var); (b) known leaf-vs-namespace collisions awaiting refactor. Add a // reason in the comments map below for each entry.

comments.${...}: All ${...} entries are dynamic key construction — t('prefix.' + var). Their resolved keys must be defined in the locale (we can't validate that statically).
comments.budget.myBudgets.*: Collision: budget.myBudgets is used both as a leaf string AND as a namespace prefix in src. JSON cannot represent both. Refactor required: rename one usage.
